sentences.english: Last month our class went on a school trip.
We visited a history museum in the city center.
The guide explained many interesting things about Korean history.
sentences.korean: 가이드가 한국 역사에 대해 흥미로운 것들을 많이 설명해줬어요.

sentences.english: After the museum we had lunch at a nearby restaurant.
sentences.korean: 박물관 후에 근처 식당에서 점심을 먹었어요.

sentences.english: It was one of the best days of the school year.
sentences.korean: 학년 중 가장 좋았던 날 중 하나였어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
